scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for(const file of ['api/chat-ai.ts','api/ai-status.ts','api/generate-questions.ts']){ if(fs.existsSync(file)){fs.rmSync(file);console.log('[AUTO-FIX] Removed legacy route:',file);} } const serverFile='server.ts'; if(fs.existsSync(serverFile)){ let s=fs.readFileSync(serverFile,'utf8'); if(s.includes('initializeApp().catch((err) => {')&&!s.includes('if (!process.env.VERCEL) initializeApp().catch((err) => {')){ s=s.replace('initializeApp().catch((err) => {','if (!process.env.VERCEL) initializeApp().catch((err) => {'); } if(!/\\bexport\\s+default\\s+app\\s*;/.test(s)){s=s.trimEnd()+'\\n\\nexport default app;\\n';} fs.writeFileSync(serverFile,s); console.log('[AUTO-FIX] Patched server.ts for Vercel.'); } const chatFile='src/components/AIChat.tsx'; if(fs.existsSync(chatFile)){ let s=fs.readFileSync(chatFile,'utf8'); s=s.replace(/\u26a1\\s*Offline\\s*D\u1ef1\\s*ph\u00f2ng/gi,'\ud83d\udcd8 Tr\u1ee3 l\u00fd h\u1ecdc t\u1eadp'); s=s.replace(/\\s*\\{\\/\\*\\s*Info panel when Gemini is offline\\s*\\*\\/\\}\\s*\\{!isUsingGemini\\s*&&\\s*\\(\\s*<div[\\s\\S]*?<\\/div>\\s*\\)\\}\\s*/m,'\\n'); s=s.replace(/\\s*\\{\\/\\*\\s*Th\u00f4ng b\u00e1o[^*]*offline[^*]*\\*\\/\\}\\s*\\{!isUsingGemini\\s*&&\\s*\\(\\s*<div[\\s\\S]*?<\\/div>\\s*\\)\\}\\s*/im,'\\n'); fs.writeFileSync(chatFile,s); console.log('[AUTO-FIX] Removed offline notice from AIChat.tsx.'); } console.log('[AUTO-FIX] Completed.');"
